title: AustraliaГўв‚¬в„ўs Largest Green Hydrogen Project Collapses: What Went Wrong with CQ-H2
content:
On June 30, 2025, AustraliaГўв‚¬в„ўs biggest leap toward a green hydrogen future came to an abrupt halt. The Central Queensland Hydrogen Project (CQ-H2)Гўв‚¬вЂќa bold, headline-grabbing vision led by Stanwell Corporation and backed for years by the Queensland State Government and Australian Federal GovernmentГўв‚¬вЂќis officially over.

The game-changer? A critical $1.6 billion funding request didnГўв‚¬в„ўt make it past the newly elected LNP government in Queensland. With no lifeline in sight, the government-owned energy giant pulled the plug. Just like that, what was once AustraliaГўв‚¬в„ўs flagship green hydrogen venture vanished into thin air.
author: Tarana Ahmad
